html:
Exclusive to:

“Provides a bit of protection against overheating, and fire immunity for a duration of 4 minutes.”

-

The Thermal Balm is an healing item that restores 20 health when used. After applied, it gives fire immunity and provides 60 overheating protection for 4 minutes. After the effect ends, the character will comment about this.

Trivia

  • The Thermal Balm was added in Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.
plainText:
Thermal Balm
"Smear on some heat protection."
Object Info
20
40
Crafting
×2 ×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"healingsalve_fumarole"
Exclusive to:
“It beats the heat.”
–Wilson
“Why would I want anything to come between me and my beautiful flames?”
–Willow
“Keeps Wolgang's skin from burning!”
–Wolfgang
“What point is there in trying to avoid pain? It finds me eventually.”
–Wendy
“THIS GROSS GOO PREVENTS OVERHEATING”
–WX-78
“It should provide adequate insulation against high temperatures.”
–Wickerbottom
“If you can't stand the heat, put on some weird bug cream, eh?”
–Woodie
“My skin has always been prone to burning.”
–Maxwell
“A ward against flame. 'Tis alsö quite möisturizing för the skin.”
–Wigfrid
“We should remember to put a little extra on our nose.”
–Webber
“A heat-repelling glaze.”
–Warly
“Ahhh. Feel nice”
–Wormwood
“Slather on a nice, thick layer and you're basically fireproof.”
–Winona
“For when the temperature's higher, or even when there's fire!”
–Wortox
“Fire lady right! Fire fun when don't hurt, florp!”
–Wurt
“Can't be too careful when it comes to fire safety!”
–Walter
“A quick application couldn't hurt.”
–Wanda
“Provides a bit of protection against overheating, and fire immunity for a duration of 4 minutes.”
-
The Thermal Balm is an healing item that restores 20 health when used. After applied, it gives fire immunity and provides 60 overheating protection for 4 minutes. After the effect ends, the character will comment about this.
“Might be time to reapply some Thermal Balm.”
–Wilson
“My Thermal Balm is wearing off. Oh well!”
–Willow
“Need more Thermal Balm!”
–Wolfgang
“The flames may consume me once again.”
–Wendy
“HEAT SHIELD FAILING”
–WX-78
“It would seem I am vulnerable to the flames once more.”
–Wickerbottom
“Is it gettin' warm in here? Might be time for another dose of that balm.”
–Woodie
“There goes my protection against the fire.”
–Maxwell
“Önce again may the fire scörch mine mörtal hide.”
–Wigfrid
“We'd better not play near fire anymore!”
–Webber
“Oh non! I am flammable once more!”
–Warly
“Hm. Cooling feeling gone...”
–Wormwood
“I think the Thermal Balm is wearin' off.”
–Winona
“My resistance to fire has just expired.”
–Wortox
“Need more theer-mole bomb!”
–Wurt
“I've got to be careful, Woby. My Thermal Balm has worn off.”
–Walter
“My protection against burning has expired.”
–Wanda
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Thermal Balm was added in Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Nhiệt Balm là một vật phẩm chữa bệnh giúp phục hồi 20 máu khi sử dụng. Sau khi áp dụng, nó mang lại khả năng chống cháy và cung cấp khả năng bảo vệ quá nhiệt 60 trong 4 phút. Sau khi hiệu ứng kết thúc, nhân vật sẽ bình luận về điều này.
